title: Senior Frontend Developer at Capital Float

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Capital Float
jsonLd.description:
Join the Capital Float family as a Frontend Developer in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Capital Float:
Capital Float is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float!
